2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

30 Ladislav Novak

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 180
  • Class Junior
  • Hometown Trnava, Slovakia
  • High School Stredna Priemyselná škola Dopravná
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2025-26 (Junior)

  • Appeared in 6 games, averaging 1.0 minutes per game.
  • Shot 42.9 percent (3-of-7) from the field, 33.3 percent (1-of-3) from three and 75.0 percent (3-of-4) from the free throw line.
  • Totaled 10 points, 6 rebounds, 3 assists, 0 steals and 0 blocks.
  • Scored a season-high 5 points vs. Lock Haven and at Seton Hill, and grabbed 2 rebounds at Seton Hill.
  • Added 1 assist vs. Lock Haven and at Seton Hill.

2024-25 (Sophomore)

  • Appeared in 13 games, averaging 0.9 minutes per game.
  • Shot 13.3 percent (2-of-15) from the field, 0.0 percent (0-of-5) from three and 57.1 percent (4-of-7) from the free throw line.
  • Totaled 8 points, 12 rebounds, 8 assists, 0 steals and 1 block.
  • Scored a season-high 2 points at West Virginia State and grabbed 5 rebounds vs. Salem (WV).
  • Added 1 block at West Virginia State and 1 assist vs. Charleston (WV).
